title: Soak Tickflow with interactive dashboard hardening
description: Combine real soak testing of Tickflow with improvements to the interactive dashboard. Use progressively larger/realistic epics to validate worktree lifecycle, merge policy, leases, resume, run records, verifier evidence, awaiting-human surfacing, and TUI lifecycle messages. Feed issues found during soak back into the dashboard and supervisor UX.
acceptance_criteria: Tickflow has been exercised on at least two representative multi-wave epics in interactive Pi, with dashboard observations recorded. The dashboard supports enough interactive inspection/actions to diagnose active runs without leaving Pi. Any bugs found during soak are either fixed or filed with reproduction notes.
